jokes.text: 'Cause nobody wants to steal a Saturn.
jokes.setup: Someone refuses to street park their Mercedes, speaker says they're doing it
jokes.punchline: Self-deprecating admission that Saturn cars are so undesirable they're theft-proof
jokes.explanation: Clean setup/punchline with good economy. Self-deprecating humor that lands efficiently.

jokes.text: No, no, no, no! No, no, no, no!
jokes.setup: Ron mentions tooth pain, someone asks if he needs a dentist
jokes.punchline: Escalating panic at the mere suggestion of dental care
jokes.explanation: Strong character moment showing Ron's phobias, though structurally simple

jokes.text: Dentist pulled the tooth out yesterday. But it's always a good idea to demonstrate to your co-workers that you are capable of withstanding a tremendous amount of pain. Plus, it's always fun to see Tom faint.
jokes.setup: Ron just had a dramatic reaction to dental suggestion
jokes.punchline: Reveals he already went to dentist, then delivers matter-of-fact justification for theatrical display
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron Swanson moment - deadpan delivery of absurd logic with specific character detail about Tom

jokes.text: which is officially my friend Burly's home, because I don't have a home.
jokes.setup: Inviting people to dinner party at 'our home'
jokes.punchline: Casual admission of homelessness
jokes.explanation: Andy's cheerful obliviousness to his dire situation creates perfect cringe comedy

jokes.text: And dinner parties do combine two of our favorite things... dinner and parties.
jokes.setup: Explaining why they want to throw a dinner party
jokes.punchline: Stating the completely obvious definition
jokes.explanation: April and Andy's genuine delivery of obvious statement shows their sweet simplicity

jokes.text: It's like if you could have a Xbox pancake.
jokes.setup: Trying to explain the appeal of dinner parties
jokes.punchline: Nonsensical analogy combining random favorite things
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Andy's childlike logic and creates memorably absurd phrase

jokes.text: Yeah. Apparently they want me to bring Avatar and 50 pairs of 3-d glasses and a 3-d-capable television.
jokes.setup: Asked if he's going to the party
jokes.punchline: Increasingly ridiculous list of requested items
jokes.explanation: Shows Andy and April's unrealistic expectations and Ben's resigned acceptance

jokes.text: Well, this is a great city. You know, it's definitely the best city in Indiana, probably America, possibly the world.
jokes.setup: Ben asking for advice about staying in Pawnee
jokes.punchline: Escalating superlatives about objectively small town
jokes.explanation: Classic Leslie Knope civic pride taken to absurd extremes with perfect escalation

jokes.text: You know what, Jerry? I make fun of you a lot, but credit where credit is due. You know, I like how the... Damn it. I was so close. It's a terrible shirt.
jokes.setup: Tom appears to be giving Jerry a rare compliment about his shirt
jokes.punchline: Admits he was trying to be nice but can't overcome his honest assessment
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Tom's struggle between being nice and being honest

jokes.text: I was in charge of the cake. To be fair, it's not a cake so much as it is a vegetable loaf.
jokes.setup: Someone brought the requested cake
jokes.punchline: Reveals it's actually a health food abomination
jokes.explanation: Classic health food character bringing inappropriate healthy substitute

jokes.text: So not only does this thing exist, but now you have deprived everyone of cake.
jokes.setup: Health person explains their vegetable loaf cake substitute
jokes.punchline: Ron's matter-of-fact assessment of the double crime
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Ron's disgust with health food and love of simple pleasures

jokes.text: We're in the jungle. There are no friends here. It's every woman for herself.
jokes.setup: Ann excited to see Donna at singles event
jokes.punchline: Treating dating event like survival scenario
jokes.explanation: Great Donna moment showing her competitive nature with dramatic metaphor

jokes.text: Dating is a zero-sum game. If you get a man, I don't get that man.
jokes.setup: Ann confused by Donna's hostile attitude
jokes.punchline: Applying economic theory to dating with ruthless logic
jokes.explanation: Brilliant application of business logic to dating that's both funny and kind of true

jokes.text: Well, you are a huge nerd. But I'd be sorry to see you go, man.
jokes.setup: Ben mentions he might be leaving
jokes.punchline: Sincere sentiment delivered with casual insult
jokes.explanation: Classic Andy - completely honest assessment paired with genuine affection

jokes.text: So are you going on, like, a year-long walking tour of the set of The Lord of the Rings in New Zealand?
jokes.setup: Ben mentioned leaving, Tom asks about plans
jokes.punchline: Specific nerd stereotype assumption about Ben's interests
jokes.explanation: Good character read on Ben being a nerd, though somewhat predictable

jokes.text: To be honest with you, I wasn't a fan of, uh, Peter Jackson's interpretation.
jokes.setup: Tom makes LOTR nerd assumption
jokes.punchline: Ben confirms he IS a LOTR nerd but with pretentious criticism
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ben response - confirms nerdiness while being pretentious about it

jokes.text: To each other.
jokes.setup: Announces he and April are getting married
jokes.punchline: Clarifies the obvious after a pause
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective beat - Andy's need to clarify the obvious

jokes.text: Are you sick? Are you terminal? Is it like that movie A Walk to Remember?
jokes.setup: Tom trying to understand why they're getting married so young
jokes.punchline: Escalating to specific melodramatic movie reference
jokes.explanation: Tom's pop culture reference and dramatic assumptions show his character

jokes.text: Well, I mean, it's actually a really funny story. We were hanging out. And suddenly, I was like, 'What if we got married tomorrow?' And she was like... 'Fine.'
jokes.setup: Asked why this great thing is happening
jokes.punchline: Underwhelming 'romantic' proposal story
jokes.explanation: Perfect Andy and April - casual approach to major life decision

jokes.text: Like, a house or, like, a condo or something. Probably a condo. It's... you can't just get a condo. No, you're right... house.
jokes.setup: Leslie points out they have no place to live
jokes.punchline: Andy's complete ignorance about how real estate works
jokes.explanation: Shows Andy's complete lack of understanding about adult responsibilities

jokes.text: It took me four years to find the right hairdresser, and we still fight all the time!
jokes.setup: Leslie arguing relationships need planning
jokes.punchline: Escalates to absurd comparison with hairdresser relationship
jokes.explanation: Good Leslie logic - applying her perfectionist nature to unlikely comparison

jokes.text: Is that that toothy girl from Mystic Pizza?
jokes.setup: Tom mentions Julia Roberts
jokes.punchline: Ron's dismissive, oddly specific description
jokes.explanation: Classic Ron dismissing pop culture with specific physical observation

jokes.text: No, I'm not. Um, I-I was just ribbing you.
jokes.setup: Ann claims to be a sporting goods manager like the guy she's talking to
jokes.punchline: Immediately admits she was lying for no good reason
jokes.explanation: Shows Ann's awkwardness at flirting through bad lie and immediate confession

jokes.text: So you just laughed and said, 'Yeah'?
jokes.setup: Ann couldn't hear what he said
jokes.punchline: Calling out her awkward fake response
jokes.explanation: Basic cringe moment - guy calling out obviously fake response

jokes.text: Did you grow up in the woods? Are you Nell from the movie Nell?
jokes.setup: Donna criticizing Ann's flirting attempt
jokes.punchline: Escalating to specific movie reference about feral child
jokes.explanation: Perfect Donna - harsh but specific movie reference criticism

jokes.text: You get drunk. You make speeches. And you make love to the prettiest bridesmaid, usually standing from behind.
jokes.setup: Tom explaining why being best man is a 'baller position'
jokes.punchline: Inappropriately specific sexual detail
jokes.explanation: Classic Tom inappropriate overshare, though relies on cheap sexual humor

jokes.text: I'm going to. And then I'm gonna divorce him. Then I'm gonna marry him again.
jokes.setup: Someone suggests April doesn't have to marry Andy
jokes.punchline: April's chaotic romantic plan
jokes.explanation: Perfect April - treats marriage casually while showing commitment in her weird way

jokes.text: One time, I fell madly in love with a Civil War reenactor that I had only known for six hours. And then I found out he wore those clothes all the time. And he was married. But the clothes thing really bothered me.
jokes.setup: Sharing relationship advice through personal story
jokes.punchline: Reveals wrong priorities - more bothered by costume than marriage
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection - sets up marriage as the problem but reveals costume obsession is worse

jokes.text: This shirt is hilarious.
jokes.setup: Jerry wearing the terrible shirt everyone mocked earlier
jokes.punchline: Andy genuinely thinks it's intentionally funny
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Andy's different perspective - sees joke value where others see failure

jokes.text: Are there any strippers here? Former strippers? Non-dancers but you're feeling a little bit drunk?
jokes.setup: Tom trying to throw impromptu bachelor party
jokes.punchline: Progressively lowering standards for entertainment
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Tom's desperation to create proper bachelor party

jokes.text: I don't know, Ann! Help me, please!
jokes.setup: Leslie desperately calling Ann for help stopping wedding
jokes.punchline: Panicked admission she has no real plan
jokes.explanation: Shows Leslie's panic and lack of actual plan despite strong opinions

jokes.text: No, Orin, I don't know how I'm going to die. Wait. Are you asking me or telling me?
jokes.setup: Someone talking to the weird character Orin
jokes.punchline: Realizes Orin might be making a threat rather than asking a question
jokes.explanation: Great escalation from weird question to potential threat - perfectly captures Orin's creepiness

jokes.text: My Brita filter is older than their relationship.
jokes.setup: Learning about Andy and April's quick engagement
jokes.punchline: Specific mundane object comparison for timing
jokes.explanation: Excellent specific comparison that perfectly captures the absurdly short timeline

jokes.text: If you would do me the obligation of having your honor heretofore in the room doth right over there, uh, hence.
jokes.setup: Wedding officiant trying to sound formal
jokes.punchline: Completely butchered pseudo-Shakespearean nonsense
jokes.explanation: Good character bit showing incompetent officiant trying too hard to sound formal

jokes.text: I guess I kind of hate most things. But I never really seem to hate you. So I want to spend the rest of my life with you. Is that cool?
jokes.setup: April's wedding vows
jokes.punchline: Most unromantic romantic declaration followed by casual question
jokes.explanation: Perfect April vows - genuinely romantic sentiment delivered in her characteristic deadpan style

jokes.text: And I don't care if I have to fight an ultimate fighter or a bear or him, your mom... I would take them down.
jokes.setup: Andy's vows about protecting April
jokes.punchline: Escalates to threatening her mother specifically
jokes.explanation: Classic Andy - sweet sentiment derailed by specific threat against in-laws

jokes.text: So that one is dead. We know that.
jokes.setup: Doves released at wedding ceremony
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact observation about failed dove release
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan observation about wedding gone wrong detail

jokes.text: Leslie, I got married twice. Both times, I was a lot older than those two. And both marriages ended in divorce... And a burning effigy.
jokes.setup: Ron giving perspective on marriage success
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of burning effigies as normal divorce procedure
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ron moment - matter-of-fact delivery of extreme divorce ritual

jokes.text: Oh, my God, you're right. I get to burn another effigy.
jokes.setup: Leslie reminds Ron he was married three times
jokes.punchline: Ron's excitement about getting to burn another ex-wife effigy
jokes.explanation: Great callback showing Ron's genuine enthusiasm for his weird divorce tradition

jokes.text: The key to burning an ex-wife effigy is to dip it in paraffin wax and then toss the flaming bottle of isopropyl alcohol... From a safe distance. Do not stand too close when you light an ex-wife effigy.
jokes.setup: Ron excited about burning another effigy
jokes.punchline: Detailed technical instructions for bizarre activity
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation - Ron treating bizarre revenge ritual like normal DIY project with safety tips

jokes.text: Also, if anyone finds my gray hoodie, I lost it.
jokes.setup: Sister giving speech about Andy and April's wedding
jokes.punchline: Ends heartfelt moment with mundane personal request
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of sentimental moment with practical concern

jokes.text: Joke, Vince Vaughn quote, obviously. Swingers Crashers? Fred Claus. Talk about Andy's ex-girlfriends. Quote from Love Actually. Hold back your tears. Pause. Drop the microphone. Get out of that bitch.
jokes.setup: Jean-Ralphio helping Tom with best man speech
jokes.punchline: Rapid-fire terrible advice ending with inappropriate language
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jean-Ralphio - rapid delivery of awful advice with inappropriate ending

jokes.text: How can anyone ever possibly top that? Am I right? So thank you all for all the talking. Let's just get back to dancing, huh?
jokes.setup: Tom's attempt at best man speech after sweet grandmother speech
jokes.punchline: Awkward admission he can't compete and immediate retreat
jokes.explanation: Good Tom moment - his ego can't handle being upstaged by sincere grandmother

jokes.text: However, he proudly told me that he 'beat herpes.'
jokes.setup: Ann telling Donna her conversation went better
jokes.punchline: Reveals disturbing overshare that makes it actually worse
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection - seeming improvement reveals even worse interaction

jokes.text: I'm a nurse, actually.
jokes.setup: Donna calls Ann a hot young doctor
jokes.punchline: Mild correction that deflates the compliment
jokes.explanation: Simple correction that slightly deflates Donna's pep talk - classic Ann

jokes.text: You're not still married, are you? But you... you're straight? Jean-Ralphio's just a friend?
jokes.setup: Andy promoting Tom to the ladies
jokes.punchline: Progressive uncertainty about Tom's availability and orientation
jokes.explanation: Good Andy moment - trying to help but revealing he knows nothing about Tom

jokes.text: I mean, seriously, I cannot emphasize how little we thought about this.
jokes.setup: Andy giving marriage advice about not overthinking
jokes.punchline: Admits they put zero thought into major life decision
jokes.explanation: Perfect Andy - completely undermines his own advice with honest admission

jokes.text: Oh, my God. That's the same girl from the thing. From the wedding ceremony, yeah. All the good ones are taken, huh, bro?
jokes.setup: Guy asking about April's availability
jokes.punchline: Realizes she just got married at the event he attended
jokes.explanation: Basic situational comedy about guy's obliviousness to obvious situation

jokes.text: 'Hope we can get together soon.' Okay, now you write, 'Who is this?'
jokes.setup: Donna helping Ann with dating text response
jokes.punchline: Suggests playing completely dumb about who she is
jokes.explanation: Good Donna dating advice - strategic confusion as flirting technique

jokes.text: We're having so much fun, except for, uh, Roberta here turns out sucks at water-skiing so bad. I'm gonna divorce you.
jokes.setup: Honeymoon video message
jokes.punchline: Immediate marital conflict over minor skill, April threatens divorce
jokes.explanation: Good callback to April's casual divorce threats, shows their dynamic hasn't changed
